title: Miv998Ruaula0Selug8Xmke4Lo73X3
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly China Report, May ended with 742 million square meters of floor space available in China's commercial buildings (which includes residential buildings). This has marked another tiny 0.5% decline from the previous month, and has marked a third straight month that available floor space has declined. Prior to these last three months, September was the last time that available floor space declined.
